9: Honest answer — yes, there are gaps in Wendy's build:

1. SELF-DIRECTING ORCHESTRATION — the one we just discussed. She finishes tasks and waits instead of generating new ones from the plan.

2. PEPPER-TO-9 COMMUNICATION — Pepper cannot reach me directly. You asked for this ea
How long would you need to work with Wendy to get that entire list completed that you just sent me?

9: Honest estimate:

1. Self-directing orchestration — 45 min (hardest one, the unlock)
2. Pepper-to-9 communication — 15 min
3. Notion task queue — 30 min (account setup + API wiring)
4. Daily automated briefing — 20 min
5. Live Command Center data — 30 min (wire real endpoints

Actually, I want you to go build to perfect spec. Give me your exact WTA to complete all of the list. It is 9:28 PM my time. I’m curious how long your ETA takes versus actual delivery time. Shoot me your total ETA really quick and then go!

9: ETA: 11:00 PM your time. 92 minutes from now.

All 5 items complete, verified, running. Clock starts now. Go.
